headline: Is It Time To Reassess Martin Marietta Materials (MLM) After The Recent Share Price Pullback?
summary: If you are wondering whether Martin Marietta Materials is still worth considering at today’s price, this article will walk through what the current market value really reflects and what it might not. The stock has pulled back recently, with a 4.3% decline over the last 7 days and an 11.8% decline over the last 30 days, although the 1 year return sits at 22.9% and the 3 year return at 85.3%. These moves sit against a broader backdrop of investor interest in materials and infrastructure linked...
